before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6lat9","text":"This protocol is recommended for a 5 mm wide gel lane. The components of the mixture should be scaled up or down, depending on the width of the lane.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare loading mixture ( 6 μl total volume): Dilute only 1 µl of DNA Ladder at a time. A B 1 Distilled water (dH 2 0)* or TE Buffer 4 μl 2 Gel Loading Dye, Purple (6X), no SDS 1 μl 3 DNA Ladder/Marker 1 μl 4 Total Volume 6 μl *For multiple loads, dilution, and storage, use TE or other buffer of minimal ionic strength instead of water. DNA may denature if diluted and stored in dH 2 0.
creator: New England   Biolabs
